what_it_does: Records ledger metadata for a design-source image asset named pitch-deck/p-15, linking it to a blob, MIME type, source label, author session, and creation timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter defines an image record with id pitch-deck/p-15
address uses the image://design-source/pitch-deck/p-15 URI scheme
recorded width and height are both 0
source is design_source_material and the body calls it 'SOURCE design ground-truth'
standouts: Width and height are 0 despite being an image record
The body explicitly labels the file as 'SOURCE design ground-truth'
No outgoing links to other ledger entries
concerns: Image dimensions are recorded as 0, suggesting missing or unextracted size metadata
No links/context connect this asset to the pitch deck or other related records
notes: A ledger stub for a pitch-deck image asset that points to a blob but lacks extracted dimensions and relationships.
questions: Why are the image width and height 0?
What visual content is on pitch-deck page 15?
Should this asset link to a deck, page sequence, or other design-source records?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to record a design ground-truth image; actual content is a metadata stub with a blob reference, zero dimensions, and no links, so it partially fulfills that purpose.
intention_signals: To register a specific pitch-deck image as a traceable design-source artifact within a channel-memory ledger.
contribution: Provides a ledger entry that associates a pitch-deck image filename with a content blob, MIME type, source label, author session, and creation timestamp for downstream retrieval and provenance.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory ledger record for pitch-deck page 15, an image/jpeg design-source asset referenced by blob with zero recorded dimensions and no links.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog a pitch-deck image as a design ground-truth source artifact with provenance metadata.
